name: SW: Log to Automations Log Sheet
description: Subworkflow: append one row to the Automations Log tab (masterSheetId from CONFIG). Input: workflowName, contactName, phone, eventType, status, notes. Standard audit trail for all systems.

parameters.content:
## SW: Log to Automations Log Sheet

**Subworkflow.** Appends one row to the **Automations Log** tab of the master Google Sheet. Every workflow that performs an action should log here for audit and debugging.

**Input:** `workflowName`, `contactName`, `phone`, `eventType`, `status`, `notes` (optional). Document ID is read from **Get Config** (`masterSheetId`).

**Google Sheets (v4.7):** Append uses **Define Below** — each column maps from **Prepare Row Data** (`$json[...]`). **Auto-map** with empty `columns.value` triggers *At least one value has to be added under 'Values to Send'* on some n8n builds.

**Output:** `{ success, data, error }`. Ensures a consistent paper trail across all systems.

**Critical:** In n8n **Settings** for this workflow, set **Error workflow** to **None** (empty). If it points at **SYS 00 — Global Error Notification**, a Sheets quota failure can re-trigger SYS 00, which calls this logger again and causes a Chat alert storm.
